chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.286 — Speed Limit

Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter may not exceed the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less. Violation of this provision shall constitute a moving violation.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.*
